TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: pai, sinsi, qai anga sun.
S.PHON: pai, sinsi, qai aŋa sun.
S.FORM: pai, sinsi, qai anga sun.
S.PHON: pai, sinsi, qai aŋa sun.
S.TRANSL: We remember you with affection, teacher.

S.FORM: ki sun a vaik anga i maza i Tayuang.
S.PHON: ki sun a vaik aŋa i maza i tajuaŋ.
S.FORM: ki sun a vaik anga i maza i Tayuang.
S.PHON: ki sun a vaik aŋa i maza i tajuaŋ.
S.TRANSL: So you are leaving (us) here in Taiwan,

S.FORM: ki sun a djemaɫun itua mareka tja kaka i Igiris.
S.PHON: ki sun a ɉəmaʎun itua marəka ca kaka i igiris.
S.FORM: ki sun a djemaljun itua mareka tja kaka i Igiris.
S.PHON: ki sun a ɉəmaʎun itua marəka ʦa kaka i igiris.
S.TRANSL: and are going to our brothers and sisters in England.

S.FORM: pai nu vaik sun, pai kiqauqaungan amen uta tua tja kama Tsemas tusa nia saqetjuan uta.
S.PHON: pai nu vaik sun, pai kiqauqauŋan amən uta tua ca kama ʦəmas tusa nia saqəcuan uta.
S.FORM: pai nu vaik sun, pai kiqauqaungan amen uta tua tja kama Cemas tusa nia saqetjuan uta.
S.PHON: pai nu vaik sun, pai kiqauqauŋan amən uta tua ʦa kama ʦəmas tusa nia saqəʦuan uta.
S.TRANSL: Well when you go pray for us too to our Father God because of our illnesses too.

S.FORM: pai maɫimaɫi aravats, Uaitu sinsi, aitsu a su kinasi Tayuangan.
S.PHON: pai maʎimaʎi aravaʦ, uaitu sinsi, aiʦu a su kinasi tajuaŋan.
S.FORM: pai maljimalji aravac, Uaitu sinsi, aicu a su kinasi Tayuangan.
S.PHON: pai maʎimaʎi aravaʦ, uaitu sinsi, aiʦu a su kinasi tajuaŋan.
S.TRANSL: Thank you very much, teacher Whitehorn, during your time in Taiwan

S.FORM: napadjaɫudjaɫun sun tjanuamen, nazemuker sun uta i tjanuamen i Kazazaɫan.
S.PHON: napaɉaʎuɉaʎun sun canuamən, nazəmukər sun uta i canuamən i kazazaʎan.
S.FORM: napadjaljudjaljun sun tjanuamen, nazemuker sun uta i tjanuamen i Kazazaljan.
S.PHON: napaɉaʎuɉaʎun sun ʦanuamən, nazəmukər sun uta i ʦanuamən i kazazaʎan.
S.TRANSL: you came to us, you also reached us in Kazazaɫan.

S.FORM: pai maɫimaɫi aravats.
S.PHON: pai maʎimaʎi aravaʦ.
S.FORM: pai maljimalji aravac.
S.PHON: pai maʎimaʎi aravaʦ.

S.FORM: malevaleva men aravats.
S.PHON: maɭəvaɭəva mən aravaʦ.
S.FORM: malevaleva men aravac.
S.PHON: maɭəvaɭəva mən aravaʦ.

S.FORM: ɫakua pai aitsu, Uaitu sinsi, nu djemaɫun sun itua mareka tja kaka, qai anga tazua, ki sun aya anga uta tjanuamen a mapuɫat a imaza i Tayuang.
S.PHON: ʎakua pai aiʦu, uaitu sinsi, nu ɉəmaʎun sun itua marəka ca kaka, qai aŋa tazua, ki sun aja aŋa uta canuamən a mapuʎat a imaza i tajuaŋ.
S.FORM: ljakua pai aicu, Uaitu sinsi, nu djemaljun sun itua mareka tja kaka, qai anga tazua, ki sun aya anga uta tjanuamen a mapuljat a imaza i Tayuang.
S.PHON: ʎakua pai aiʦu, uaitu sinsi, nu ɉəmaʎun sun itua marəka ʦa kaka, qai aŋa tazua, ki sun aja aŋa uta ʦanuamən a mapuʎat a imaza i tajuaŋ.
S.TRANSL: But now, teacher Whitehorn, when you reach our brothers and sisters, you will remember with affection all of us here in Taiwan.

S.FORM: pai nu izuanga sun uta itua mareka tja kaka, ki men a su sikiqauqaungan uta sakamaya tua tja Kama i vavaw.
S.PHON: pai nu izuaŋa sun uta itua marəka ca kaka, ki mən a su sikiqauqauŋan uta sakamaja tua ca kama i vavaw.
S.FORM: pai nu izuanga sun uta itua mareka tja kaka, ki men a su sikiqauqaungan uta sakamaya tua tja Kama i vavaw.
S.PHON: pai nu izuaŋa sun uta itua marəka ʦa kaka, ki mən a su sikiqauqauŋan uta sakamaja tua ʦa kama i vavaw.
S.TRANSL: And when you are there with our brothers and sisters, you will certainly pray for us to our Father above.

S.FORM: pai nu ika men a sa makapidaɫ uta, ki tjen a metsevutsevung anga i kalevelevan, nu napasusu amen tua su tulu ta su pazazekazekatj.
S.PHON: pai nu ika mən a sa makapidaʎ uta, ki cən a məʦəvuʦəvuŋ aŋa i kaɭəvəɭəvan, nu napasusu amən tua su tuɭu ta su pazazəkazəkac.
S.FORM: pai nu ika men a sa makapidalj uta, ki tjen a mecevucevung anga i kalevelevan, nu napasusu amen tua su tulu ta su pazazekazekatj.
S.PHON: pai nu ika mən a sa makapidaʎ uta, ki ʦən a məʦəvuʦəvuŋ aŋa i kaɭəvəɭəvan, nu napasusu amən tua su tuɭu ta su pazazəkazəkaʦ.
S.TRANSL: And if we don’t last so many days, we will meet in heaven, if we fulfil your teaching and commands.

S.FORM: pai amin a ?u kai.
S.PHON: pai amin a ʔu kai.
S.FORM: pai amin a 'u kai.
S.PHON: pai amin a ʔu kai.
S.TRANSL: Well that’s all I have to say.

S.FORM: qai anga sun.
S.PHON: qai aŋa sun.
S.FORM: qai anga sun.
S.PHON: qai aŋa sun.
